records.question: Which manufacturers have the name Hewlett-Packard and whose founder is James?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT manufacturers.code FROM manufacturers
WHERE manufacturers.name = 'Hewlett-Packard' AND manufacturers.founder = 'James'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Code FROM Manufacturers WHERE Name = 'Hewlett-Packard' AND Founder = 'James'

records.question: What manufacturers produce products that are priced exactly at 120?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT manufacturers.code FROM manufacturers
JOIN products ON manufacturers.code = products.manufacturer
WHERE products.price = 120
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Code FROM Manufacturers AS T1 JOIN Products AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Manufacturer WHERE T2.Price = 120

records.question: Which manufacturers named Hewlett-Packard, founded by James, have their headquarter in Los Angeles, revenue at most 50.0, and offer a Toner cartridge priced exactly 66?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT manufacturers.code FROM manufacturers
JOIN products ON manufacturers.code = products.manufacturer
WHERE manufacturers.headquarter = 'Los Angeles' AND manufacturers.revenue <= 50.0 AND manufacturers.founder = 'James' AND manufacturers.name = 'Hewlett-Packard' AND products.name = 'Toner cartridge' AND products.price = 66
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Code FROM Manufacturers AS T1 INNER JOIN Products AS T2 ON T1.Code = T2.Manufacturer WHERE T1.Name = 'Hewlett-Packard' AND T1.Founder = 'James' AND T1.Headquarter = 'Los Angeles' AND T1.Revenue <= 50.0 AND T2.Name = 'Toner cartridge' AND T2.Price = 66
